_meta.note: Full Knack lists and rules text: Pandora’s Box (Revised) Calling chapters (primary). Each knack includes `knackKind`: "mortal" (Mortal Knack, one Calling slot; only kind allowed at Origin / Mortal tier) or "immortal" (Immortal Knack, two Calling slots; Hero+). Tier gates use `tierMin` / `tierMax` (titanic tier counts as Hero tier for these gates). Mythos inverted knacks (mythos_*) require pantheon mythos per MotM pp. 47–48. Saints & Monsters knacks (sm_*), including Titanic Callings and Outsider/Shepherd lists, merge from ``data/tables/knacks/20_*.json`` at bundle load. Titans Rising Titanic Knacks (tr_*) merge from ``data/tables/knacks/30_*.json`` after S&M (see ``app/services/data_tables.py``). Optional `patronKindAnyOf`: ["titan"] / ["deity"] gates knacks or boons by Paths patron type.

eligibility.callings: Array of Calling ids, or omit / callingsAny true for any Calling.
eligibility.tierMin: Minimum character tier: mortal | sorcerer | hero | titanic | demigod | god (default mortal).
eligibility.purviewAnyOf: If set, character must have at least one listed Purview.
eligibility.pantheonAnyOf: If set, character.pantheonId must match one entry.
eligibility.deityAnyOf: If set, character.parentDeityId must match one entry.
eligibility.knackKind: "mortal" = Scion Mortal Knack (one Calling slot; valid at Origin / Mortal tier). "immortal" = Immortal Knack (two Calling slots; Hero tier minimum in play). Origin (Mortal) characters may only take knackKind "mortal".

aPurpose.name: A Purpose
aPurpose.description: Origin only: one Mortal Knack of this style active at a time unless you purchase extras. Dedicate yourself to protecting an ideal embodied by a person, place, or community.
aPurpose.mechanicalEffects: Mortal Knack option in Origin chargen; only one Knack active at a time unless extras purchased (p. 99). Full text in Pandora’s Box Guardian section.

internalSchoolBoxing.name: Internal School Boxing
internalSchoolBoxing.description: Per Pandora’s Box Warrior rules at your table. Martial practice turned inward—soft power, hard results.
internalSchoolBoxing.mechanicalEffects: Martial Knack; confirm dice and limits with Pandora’s Box (Warrior) or your table.

auraOfGreatness.name: Aura of Greatness
auraOfGreatness.description: Something about the Scion affects people around them—inspiring, reassuring, or intimidating—reflecting divine heritage.
auraOfGreatness.mechanicalEffects: Pick one Social Skill (Leadership, Empathy, or Persuasion); once per session add Enhancement 2 to one roll of that type. General / Heroic Knack (Pandora’s Box); also listed for pre-Visitation Scions under “any Calling” in Origin chargen.
auraOfGreatness.source: Scion_Origin_(Revised_Download).pdf, Knacks (any Calling); SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf, General Heroic Knacks

forgettable.name: Forgettable
forgettable.description: Slip from notice when you aren’t forcing the issue.
forgettable.mechanicalEffects: Listed as sample supernatural Path knack in Origin appendix—verify tier access with Storyguide.

creator_innate_toolkit.name: Innate Toolkit
creator_innate_toolkit.description: One Repair or Build action. You can work your craft even without proper tools.
creator_innate_toolkit.mechanicalEffects: One Repair or Build Action; no Injury from missing tools when using hands.

creator_perfect_rendition.name: Perfect Rendition
creator_perfect_rendition.description: One scene. Photo-perfect recall of images, maps, or signatures you have seen.
creator_perfect_rendition.mechanicalEffects: One Scene; Clash of Wills if observation was obscured supernaturally.

creator_reverse_engineer.name: Reverse Engineer
creator_reverse_engineer.description: Each time you dismantle an object, you grasp how to rebuild or copy it (materials, time, and Scale still apply).
creator_reverse_engineer.mechanicalEffects: When you dismantle an object, you immediately understand how to rebuild it or produce new versions from what you learned (subject to materials, time, and Scale as in Pandora’s Box).

creator_the_unlimited_quartermaster.name: The Unlimited Quartermaster
creator_the_unlimited_quartermaster.description: One Building or Repair action. You can source mundane crafting supplies without a roll unless blocked.
creator_the_unlimited_quartermaster.mechanicalEffects: One Building or Repair Action; Clash of Wills if access is opposed.

creator_we_go_all_night.name: We Go All Night
creator_we_go_all_night.description: One project through completion, then mandatory rest. Work a creative project without stopping until it is finished, then rest a day.
creator_we_go_all_night.mechanicalEffects: Includes working through Damage; then mandatory rest.

creator_wireless_interface.name: Wireless Interface
creator_wireless_interface.description: One scene. Use powered devices in line of sight without touching them.
creator_wireless_interface.mechanicalEffects: One Scene; very large devices at SG discretion.

creator_flawlessly_platonic_ideal.name: Flawlessly Platonic Ideal
creator_flawlessly_platonic_ideal.description: Named on Onyx Path forums as a Creator Origin option alongside the other one-slot Knacks.
creator_flawlessly_platonic_ideal.mechanicalEffects: Confirm full text in your printing of Pandora’s Box / errata.

creator_afternoon_of_fortnights.name: Afternoon of Fortnights
creator_afternoon_of_fortnights.description: One Build or Repair action. Compress project time with a (Crafts+Epic) roll.
creator_afternoon_of_fortnights.mechanicalEffects: One Build or Repair Action. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

creator_lifted_from_dust.name: Lifted from Dust
creator_lifted_from_dust.description: One Build or Repair action. Build without needing specific parts—raw matter suffices.
creator_lifted_from_dust.mechanicalEffects: One Build or Repair Action. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

creator_raise_the_pillars_of_the_earth.name: Raise the Pillars of the Earth
creator_raise_the_pillars_of_the_earth.description: One Build or Repair action. Shape structures with (Crafts+Epic) roll and scale of successes.
creator_raise_the_pillars_of_the_earth.mechanicalEffects: One Build or Repair Action. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

creator_touch_of_the_muses.name: Touch of the Muses
creator_touch_of_the_muses.description: For the duration of an artistic project. While collaborators work an artistic project together, their rolls get extra punch from your inspiration.
creator_touch_of_the_muses.mechanicalEffects: On an artistic project, double successes on each roll made by one artistic partner; you may spend Momentum to include yourself. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—Pandora’s Box (Revised) p. 23; Hero p. 226.

guardian_a_fortress.name: A Fortress
guardian_a_fortress.description: Indefinite. Name a room or small building as a sanctuary for your charge.
guardian_a_fortress.mechanicalEffects: Indefinite; sense intrusions; attacks from outside blocked while charge remains.

guardian_a_sentinel.name: A Sentinel
guardian_a_sentinel.description: Indefinite. Share senses between you, those who perceive your charge, and your charge.

guardian_a_talisman.name: A Talisman
guardian_a_talisman.description: Indefinite. Bless an object so its bearer gains +2 Enhancement on rolls to defend or protect against a named threat you set when blessing.
guardian_a_talisman.mechanicalEffects: Indefinite; Knack Skill roll unless the bearer is your charge (then automatic).

guardian_a_vigil.name: A Vigil
guardian_a_vigil.description: Condition. Stand guard without needing food or sleep while vigil holds.
guardian_a_vigil.mechanicalEffects: Condition; one vigil at a time; target in sight.

guardian_a_warning.name: A Warning
guardian_a_warning.description: Condition while you protect your charge. Sense danger and hostile intent toward your charge.
guardian_a_warning.mechanicalEffects: Condition while you protect your charge.

guardian_by_your_side.name: By your Side
guardian_by_your_side.description: Indefinite. Teleport next to your charge when needed; innate warning.
guardian_by_your_side.mechanicalEffects: Indefinite; pay Legend to change charge. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

guardian_eternal_guardian.name: Eternal Guardian
guardian_eternal_guardian.description: Condition. Cannot die or tire until your charge is safe—then damage applies fully.
guardian_eternal_guardian.mechanicalEffects: Condition. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

guardian_living_pillar.name: Living Pillar
guardian_living_pillar.description: Condition. Immune to environmental hazards while shielding your charge in arm’s reach.
guardian_living_pillar.mechanicalEffects: Condition; charge shares immunity except needs for food/sleep. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

guardian_they_cannot_be_touched.name: They cannot be touched
guardian_they_cannot_be_touched.description: End of the session. Spend Momentum to make one person you share a Bond with (or who is lower Tier) immune to all damage until the session ends—only when they genuinely need shielding.
guardian_they_cannot_be_touched.mechanicalEffects: End of session. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—Pandora’s Box (Revised) p. 29.

healer_the_bare_minimum.name: The bare minimum
healer_the_bare_minimum.description: Always when you tend a patient, even with improvised tools. Treat serious wounds with improvised, unsanitary tools when nothing better exists.
healer_the_bare_minimum.mechanicalEffects: You can always tend someone safely: no increased Difficulty and no extra risk to the patient even with only scraps (twigs, dirt, etc.). Surgery under those conditions stays at normal Difficulty.

healer_combat_medic.name: Combat Medic
healer_combat_medic.description: Once per turn. Keep allies on their feet during a fight with battlefield first aid.
healer_combat_medic.mechanicalEffects: Once per turn while tending an ally’s wounds in combat, remove any +1 Bruised Injury they have (including armor damage) without rolling. You cannot take Mixed actions while using this Knack.

healer_damage_conversion.name: Damage Conversion
healer_damage_conversion.description: Each time you administer medical attention as an action. Convert injuries downward when you give real medical attention.
healer_damage_conversion.mechanicalEffects: When you administer medical attention to a patient or yourself as an action, convert each Injury one step down the track (Maimed→Injured→Bruised→healed).

healer_doctor_s_kit.name: Doctor's Kit
healer_doctor_s_kit.description: At the start of each qualifying combat scene. Spend held successes from your Knack roll to erase allies’ injuries during a fight.
healer_doctor_s_kit.mechanicalEffects: At the start of a combat scene, roll your Knack Skill and bank successes; spend them when a bandmate or ally in your range band takes an Injury (Ice Pack 1s / Swift Bandaging 2s / Emergency Operation 4s until scene end per book).

healer_immunization_booster.name: Immunization Booster
healer_immunization_booster.description: While your designated patients remain under your care. Shelter a small circle of patients from disease, poison, and slow recovery.
healer_immunization_booster.mechanicalEffects: Designate up to your Knack Skill in characters under your care. While protected, they gain +2 Enhancement to resist poison and disease and to recover from Injuries; protected Storyguide characters auto-resist as the book describes.

healer_instant_diagnosis.name: Instant Diagnosis
healer_instant_diagnosis.description: After meaningful interaction with an ailing subject. Diagnose ailments and context after meaningful interaction with a patient.
healer_instant_diagnosis.mechanicalEffects: After meaningful interaction with an ailing target, you know what is wrong and other pertinent medical facts; supernatural illness may require a Knack Skill roll opposed by whoever afflicted them.
healer_instant_diagnosis.source: SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf, Healer — With a Glance (listed as Instant Diagnosis in app data)

healer_surgeon_with_the_hands_of_gods.name: Surgeon with the Hands of God
healer_surgeon_with_the_hands_of_gods.description: Each qualifying medical procedure you perform. Halve procedure time; no extra Difficulty for critically ill or injured patients.
healer_surgeon_with_the_hands_of_gods.mechanicalEffects: Halve the time needed for any medical procedure (e.g. surgery). You never suffer increased Difficulty to treat critically ill or injured patients.
healer_surgeon_with_the_hands_of_gods.source: SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf, Healer — Surgeon with the Hands of God

healer_breath_of_life.name: Breath of Life
healer_breath_of_life.description: Within three minutes of death, if you can touch the body. Resurrect the recently dead with grave damage remaining.
healer_breath_of_life.mechanicalEffects: If you touch a target within three minutes of death, spend Legend to restore them with all Injury boxes filled; after three minutes they cannot be revived this way. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—Pandora’s Box (Revised).

healer_internal_refinery.name: Internal Refinery
healer_internal_refinery.description: Until next sunrise or sunset. Cure self of poison/disease and generate cure for others.
healer_internal_refinery.mechanicalEffects: Until next sunrise or sunset. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

healer_panacea.name: Panacea
healer_panacea.description: Instant. Mass-produce known cures or antidotes.
healer_panacea.mechanicalEffects: Instant. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

healer_reconstruction.name: Reconstruction
healer_reconstruction.description: Once per day. Remove disabling conditions and reshape your Attributes between sessions.
healer_reconstruction.mechanicalEffects: Once per day, roll Knack Skill; on any success, remove one non-illness Condition (blindness, lost limb, paralysis, PTSD, etc.). Spend Momentum for additional removals. At session start you may reorder your Attribute dots within the same categories (book limits). Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—Pandora’s Box (Revised).

hunter_apex_predator.name: Apex Predator
hunter_apex_predator.description: Until confronting target. Foes must win (Resolve+Force) with Epic success to attack you first.

hunter_eyes_in_the_blinds.name: Eyes in the Blinds
hunter_eyes_in_the_blinds.description: While the token stays placed (one day in-game or one session, whichever is longer). Invest power in a token to watch a Field as if you were there.
hunter_eyes_in_the_blinds.mechanicalEffects: Spend Momentum to charge a small token and place it in a Field you are aware of. While it remains, you observe that Field as if present; lasts one in-game day or one session of play, whichever is longer. Token notice Difficulty equals your Hunter Calling dots. Ends if the token leaves or is destroyed.

hunter_internal_compass.name: Internal Compass
hunter_internal_compass.description: Until reaching destination. Never roll to navigate; bonus in magical mazes.

hunter_keen_eyed_predator.name: Keen-Eyed Predator
hunter_keen_eyed_predator.description: Instant. On entering a place, ask structured questions about hazards and threats.

hunter_most_dangerous_prey.name: Most Dangerous Prey
hunter_most_dangerous_prey.description: Until confronting target. While pursuing chosen target, gain Speed and penalize their perception.

hunter_silence_in_the_woods.name: Silence in the Woods
hunter_silence_in_the_woods.description: Until confronting target. Silent pursuit and ambush enhancement.

hunter_it_s_a_trap.name: It's a Trap!
hunter_it_s_a_trap.description: While hunting and laying traps (per Pandora’s Box Hunter). Hide traps from perception until triggered.
hunter_it_s_a_trap.mechanicalEffects: Lay ambushes or hazards while hunting so they stay unnoticed until they spring; trap ratings, Structure, and opposed perception follow Pandora’s Box Hunter (Revised). Confirm this knack’s exact title in your printing if it differs.

hunter_always_there.name: Always There
hunter_always_there.description: Until confronting target. Know location and route to quarry, or teleport to them.
hunter_always_there.mechanicalEffects: Until confronting target. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

hunter_perfect_camouflage.name: Perfect Camouflage
hunter_perfect_camouflage.description: Until confronting target. Invisibility and intangibility while hunting.
hunter_perfect_camouflage.mechanicalEffects: Until confronting target. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

hunter_relentless.name: Relentless
hunter_relentless.description: Until target is overcome. Ignore harm and fatigue until prey is overcome—then damage applies.
hunter_relentless.mechanicalEffects: Until target is overcome. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

hunter_send_the_pack.name: Send the Pack
hunter_send_the_pack.description: Until target is overcome. Summon shadow hunting allies with traits and dice pools.
hunter_send_the_pack.mechanicalEffects: Until target is overcome. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

judge_eye_for_an_eye.name: Eye for an Eye
judge_eye_for_an_eye.description: Eight hours. Reflect an Injury back on an attacker who injured you.

judge_indisputable_analysis.name: Indisputable Analysis
judge_indisputable_analysis.description: Eight hours. Know crimes committed by people around you per your law.

judge_lie_detector.name: Lie Detector
judge_lie_detector.description: Eight hours. Cannot be lied to; sense concealment.

judge_objection.name: Objection!
judge_objection.description: Instant. Pause hostile action in earshot briefly.

judge_on_the_case.name: On the Case
judge_on_the_case.description: End of the session while you are casing an investigation. While you investigate an event or scene (“casing”), you read motives and spot clues more keenly.
judge_on_the_case.mechanicalEffects: +1 Enhancement (before the roll) to discern motives and search for clues while casing; casing lasts until the end of the session.

judge_quick_study.name: Quick Study
judge_quick_study.description: Instant. Absorb information from many sources at once.

judge_the_truth_arises.name: The truth arises
judge_the_truth_arises.description: Eight hours. Listeners know you speak truth.

judge_bound_by_oath.name: Bound by Oath
judge_bound_by_oath.description: Indefinite. Bind an oath with ceremony and fate dice support or penalties.
judge_bound_by_oath.mechanicalEffects: Indefinite. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

judge_i_am_the_law.name: I am the Law
judge_i_am_the_law.description: Instant. Impose accepted punishment after contested roll.
judge_i_am_the_law.mechanicalEffects: Instant. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

judge_the_pain_of_dishonesty.name: The Pain of Dishonesty
judge_the_pain_of_dishonesty.description: Eight hours. Punish lies with upgraded damage until truth is spoken.
judge_the_pain_of_dishonesty.mechanicalEffects: 8 Hours. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

judge_terror_of_the_guilty.name: Terror of the Guilty
judge_terror_of_the_guilty.description: Eight hours. Drive the guilty to flee or confess.
judge_terror_of_the_guilty.mechanicalEffects: 8 Hours; Clash of Wills vs supernaturals. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

leader_one_for_all_and_all_for_one.name: One for all and all for one!
leader_one_for_all_and_all_for_one.description: One mission. Followers cannot attack each other and aid when asked.

leader_sir_yes_sir.name: Sir, yes Sir!
leader_sir_yes_sir.description: One mission. Orders must be followed; Clash if supernaturally resisted.

leader_good_listener.name: Good Listener
leader_good_listener.description: One mission. Team confides in you; betrayal doubles Fate pool until forgiven or Epic rises.

leader_grand_entrance.name: Grand Entrance
leader_grand_entrance.description: One mission. Defeating a rival leader makes you recognized successor.

leader_lighthouse_of_society.name: Lighthouse of Society
leader_lighthouse_of_society.description: One scene. Calm and direct crowds without rolls unless magic caused fear.

leader_perfect_poise.name: Perfect Poise
leader_perfect_poise.description: One mission. Control displayed emotion and body language; share with team in sight.

leader_uncle_sam_needs_you.name: Uncle Sam needs you!
leader_uncle_sam_needs_you.description: One mission. Recruit strangers to your mission as followers.
leader_uncle_sam_needs_you.mechanicalEffects: One Mission. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

leader_everyone_gets_to_go_home.name: Everyone gets to go home
leader_everyone_gets_to_go_home.description: Condition. Take your team’s damage until mission ends.
leader_everyone_gets_to_go_home.mechanicalEffects: Condition. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

leader_masterful_efficiency.name: Masterful Efficiency
leader_masterful_efficiency.description: One mission. Telepathic coordination and command link for the team.
leader_masterful_efficiency.mechanicalEffects: One Mission. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

leader_not_today_friends.name: Not Today, Friends
leader_not_today_friends.description: One mission. Orders keep allies from quitting until task is done.
leader_not_today_friends.mechanicalEffects: One Mission. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

liminal_just_passing_through.name: Just passing through
liminal_just_passing_through.description: Condition. Go unnoticed until destination unless hostile.

liminal_complete_privacy.name: Complete Privacy
liminal_complete_privacy.description: Until next sunrise or sunset. Mundane surveillance cannot pierce your interactions.

liminal_experienced_traveler.name: Experienced Traveler
liminal_experienced_traveler.description: Until destination. Know travel essentials (money, lodging, buildings, local language knowledge).

liminal_godly_camping.name: Godly camping
liminal_godly_camping.description: Until destination. Nature does not attack you while traveling.

liminal_neither_the_minute_nor_the_hour.name: Neither the Minute nor the Hour
liminal_neither_the_minute_nor_the_hour.description: Until destination. Reduce travel time units with (Dexterity+Epic) successes.

liminal_unerring_delivery.name: Unerring Delivery
liminal_unerring_delivery.description: Each delivery you send through an intermediary. Send a message through an intermediary so it reaches the recipient immediately, even off-grid.
liminal_unerring_delivery.mechanicalEffects: Choose a messenger (passerby, small spirit, etc.); the message reaches the intended recipient instantly as in Pandora’s Box Liminal — Unerring Delivery.

liminal_the_long_road_to_anywhere.name: The long road to anywhere
liminal_the_long_road_to_anywhere.description: Condition. Journey without stopping; must rest at arrival; hospitality on arrival.

liminal_instant_travel.name: Instant Travel
liminal_instant_travel.description: Until destination. Travel takes no time unless stopped.
liminal_instant_travel.mechanicalEffects: Until destination. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

liminal_jim_always_lived_next_door.name: Jim always lived next door
liminal_jim_always_lived_next_door.description: Indefinite. Claim housing and fit into community as if always there.
liminal_jim_always_lived_next_door.mechanicalEffects: Indefinite. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

liminal_pierce_the_veil.name: Pierce the Veil
liminal_pierce_the_veil.description: Instant. Enter supernatural realms via a doorway.
liminal_pierce_the_veil.mechanicalEffects: Instant. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

liminal_skip.name: Skip
liminal_skip.description: One scene. Teleport on Move within line of sight ignoring hazards.
liminal_skip.mechanicalEffects: One Scene. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

lover_fluid_appeal.name: Fluid Appeal
lover_fluid_appeal.description: Indefinite. Embody ideal beauty for one chosen person.

lover_i_am_a_fire.name: I am a Fire
lover_i_am_a_fire.description: Fan the feelings one person has toward another (or toward you); Storyguide shapes NPC passions.
lover_i_am_a_fire.mechanicalEffects: When you stoke affection between people (including toward yourself), work with the Storyguide on how passion manifests; bandmates require player consent. If you target yourself toward a chosen partner, +1 Enhancement to Social rolls involving them until the session ends.

lover_lover_s_intuition.name: Lover's Intuition
lover_lover_s_intuition.description: Instant. Learn romantic connections with a touch.

lover_on_your_side.name: On your Side
lover_on_your_side.description: Indefinite until harm from your words. Chosen ally who likes you treats you as ultimate trust.
lover_on_your_side.mechanicalEffects: Indefinite until harm from your words.

lover_not_a_fighter.name: Not a Fighter
lover_not_a_fighter.description: One scene. If you do not attack, enemies avoid targeting you directly.

lover_perfect_partner.name: Perfect Partner
lover_perfect_partner.description: Indefinite. Telepathic link with willing partner who likes you.

lover_soothing_presence.name: Soothing Presence
lover_soothing_presence.description: One scene. Calm anger and stress in sight while not fighting.

lover_center_of_attention.name: Center of Attention
lover_center_of_attention.description: One party. Important people appear where you need them socially.
lover_center_of_attention.mechanicalEffects: One Party. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

lover_for_you_i_will.name: For you, I will
lover_for_you_i_will.description: One task. Gain Willpower and possibly Birthright/Legend by impressing a lover.
lover_for_you_i_will.mechanicalEffects: One Task. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

lover_hearts_aflame.name: Hearts Aflame
lover_hearts_aflame.mechanicalEffects: Indefinite. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

lover_lover_s_oath.name: Lover's Oath
lover_lover_s_oath.description: Indefinite. Bind lovers with shared awareness and shared harm options.
lover_lover_s_oath.mechanicalEffects: Indefinite. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

sage_blockade_of_reason.name: Blockade of Reason
sage_blockade_of_reason.description: Always on (passive). Call out grifts and nonsense so cons and coercion bounce off you.
sage_blockade_of_reason.mechanicalEffects: Lower-Tier characters cannot trick, coerce, swindle, or con you. Supernatural attempts to do so provoke a Clash of Wills; you gain +2 Enhancement on that Clash.

sage_master_of_the_world.name: Master of the World
sage_master_of_the_world.description: Inside a Field, you spot plausible Enhancements or Complications others overlook—if they fit the Field’s features.
sage_master_of_the_world.mechanicalEffects: While in a Field, assign up to three total Enhancement/Complication points (split between them) that are obvious to you but not to other observers; each must suit the Field (no impossible props or contradictions). At most three such points may apply to the Field at once, no matter how many Scions use this Knack.

sage_palace_of_memory.name: Palace of Memory
sage_palace_of_memory.description: Whenever you recall studied or experienced facts. Recall what you lived or studied without dropping salient facts; reclaim missed procedural clues.
sage_palace_of_memory.mechanicalEffects: No roll needed to remember salient facts or clues you could know; you may assert a narrative advantage you reasonably remembered without invoking a Path. If you missed a Procedural Clue in an earlier scene, you may try once to rediscover it (per Pandora’s Box).

sage_presence_of_magic.name: Presence of Magic
sage_presence_of_magic.description: Each time you ask about a place or object in play. Sense when something nearby is truly magical or sacred.
sage_presence_of_magic.mechanicalEffects: Ask the Storyguide if a place or object is magical or sacred; they must answer honestly yes or no, bypassing Occult identification rolls for that question.

sage_office_hours.name: Office Hours
sage_office_hours.description: Whenever someone brings you a problem you can solve. Coach someone through a problem you can solve—or lean in yourself if you cannot.
sage_office_hours.mechanicalEffects: When someone brings you a problem you can solve, they gain +1 Enhancement (before rolls) to resolve it with your coaching; if you cannot solve it, you gain the same bonus to fix it yourself. Spend Momentum to pull a Storyguide character to you with a problem that needs solving.

sage_omniglot_translation.name: Omniglot Translation
sage_omniglot_translation.description: While translating or dictating written work in play. Speak and read foreign languages flawlessly; churn out written translations fast.
sage_omniglot_translation.mechanicalEffects: Conversation and reading in foreign languages are perfect (no accent). Turn out written translations in your native language in minutes without a roll; divine runes or gods’ handwriting still needs a Knack Skill roll but stays swift.

sage_multi_talent.name: Multi Talent
sage_multi_talent.description: Frequency varies by effect—confirm with your Storyguide. Choose another Heroic Knack from any Calling (per book).

sage_cipher.name: Cipher
sage_cipher.description: Always on (passive). Break lower-Tier codes and author encryption only peers can realistically crack.
sage_cipher.mechanicalEffects: You are never stumped by codes or encryption set by a lower-Tier character. Encryption you create cannot be solved by lower-Tier characters; you add half your Legend (round up) in Enhancement to resist decryption from equals or betters (before the roll). Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—Pandora’s Box (Revised) p. 57.

sage_eternal_genius.name: Eternal Genius
sage_eternal_genius.description: Indefinite. ST reveals probable story conclusion; Fate dice while you don’t fight fate.
sage_eternal_genius.mechanicalEffects: Indefinite. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

sage_immortal_mastermind.name: Immortal Mastermind
sage_immortal_mastermind.description: One plan. Team knows their part of your plan; you sense progress.
sage_immortal_mastermind.mechanicalEffects: One Plan. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

sage_overworld_knowledge.name: Overworld Knowledge
sage_overworld_knowledge.description: Instant. Int+Epic successes become questions to the ST.
sage_overworld_knowledge.mechanicalEffects: Instant. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

trickster_blather_and_skite.name: Blather and Skite
trickster_blather_and_skite.description: Automatic on same or lower Tier; rolled against higher Tier. Nonsense buys time for infiltration or escapes.
trickster_blather_and_skite.mechanicalEffects: Automatic on same- or lower-Tier targets; against higher Tier, roll Knack Skill. Each success buys five minutes of in-game time or one combat turn (whichever fits) before enemies realize the intrusion; bandmates require their players’ consent.

trickster_why_so_serious.name: Why so serious
trickster_why_so_serious.description: Until target tells a joke. Target cannot be taken seriously.

trickster_the_fish_trick.name: The fish trick
trickster_the_fish_trick.description: Each time you swap two objects in line of sight. Swap positions of two non-living items you can see.
trickster_the_fish_trick.mechanicalEffects: Exchange the positions of two inanimate objects in your line of sight. If either object is supernatural, the owner may oppose with a Clash of Wills. Confirm exact costs and limits in your printing of Pandora’s Box Trickster knacks.

trickster_rumor_miller.name: Rumor Miller
trickster_rumor_miller.description: Each time you roll to seed a rumor, it reaches the boss, spouse, friends, or other audience it should sting.
trickster_rumor_miller.mechanicalEffects: Make a Knack Skill roll; any successes mean the rumor about the target reaches the people who should hear it (boss, spouse, friends, etc.) as in Pandora’s Box.

trickster_smoke_and_mirrors.name: Smoke and Mirrors
trickster_smoke_and_mirrors.description: Once per scene. When a hit would take you out, spend Momentum to negate that damage, slip one range band away, and leave a brief crumbling afterimage.
trickster_smoke_and_mirrors.mechanicalEffects: Once per scene, when you would be Taken Out, spend Momentum instead: negate the damage that would take you out and move one range band from your attacker, leaving an outline that crumbles away moments later.

trickster_takes_one_to_know_one.name: Takes one to know one
trickster_takes_one_to_know_one.description: Until next sunrise or sunset. Strip ability to communicate truth from a character.

trickster_wasn_t_me.name: Wasn't me
trickster_wasn_t_me.description: One session. Delay blame with Clash vs supernatural detection.

trickster_doppelgaenger.name: Doppelganger
trickster_doppelgaenger.description: Each time you roll to create your duplicate. Create an obedient copy with your traits.
trickster_doppelgaenger.mechanicalEffects: Roll Knack Skill; with successes you create an exact copy of yourself with your Attributes, Skills, Knacks, and Boons, controlled by you for social or investigative tasks. It cannot use teamwork, dissipates if attacked, and otherwise lasts days equal to your Trickster Calling dots. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—Pandora’s Box (Revised) p. 63.

trickster_one_man_s_trash.name: One Man's Trash
trickster_one_man_s_trash.description: Condition. Make junk trade as top value until compared.
trickster_one_man_s_trash.mechanicalEffects: Condition; Clash if tested supernaturally. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

trickster_surprise_motherfucker.name: Surprise, Motherfucker!
trickster_surprise_motherfucker.description: Instant. Feign being Taken Out and return later for surprise.
trickster_surprise_motherfucker.mechanicalEffects: Instant; once per witness per book. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

trickster_woven_from_lies.name: Woven from Lies
trickster_woven_from_lies.description: Indefinite. Invent a person who becomes real in the story.
trickster_woven_from_lies.mechanicalEffects: Indefinite; Fate may complicate. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

warrior_the_biggest_threat.name: The Biggest Threat
warrior_the_biggest_threat.description: One fight. Force a show of strength so enemies must deal with you first.

warrior_close_the_gap.name: Close the Gap!
warrior_close_the_gap.description: Instant. Leap into melee with a visible enemy.

warrior_death_by_teacup.name: Death by Teacup
warrior_death_by_teacup.description: Until you release it, it breaks, you stop using it with a Warrior Skill, or (if thrown) until impact. An improvised weapon temporarily takes the weapon profile of a similar-sized real armament (teacup as knuckles, glass shard as knife, etc.).
warrior_death_by_teacup.mechanicalEffects: Until you release it, it breaks, you stop using it with a Warrior Skill, or (if thrown) until impact—Pandora’s Box (Revised) p. 66.

warrior_enhanced_impact.name: Enhanced Impact
warrior_enhanced_impact.description: One fight. Successful damage knocks down and pushes target.

warrior_master_of_weapons.name: Master of Weapons
warrior_master_of_weapons.description: One session. Favored weapon gains Epic dice and rote for the session.

warrior_trick_shot.name: Trick Shot
warrior_trick_shot.description: One session. Negate ranged penalties; shoot without line of sight if barriers allow.

warrior_tempered.name: Tempered
warrior_tempered.description: One fight. Heavy armor and reflect/destroy melee/projectiles per book.

warrior_army_of_one.name: Army of One
warrior_army_of_one.description: One fight. No outnumbered penalties; extra Epic dice distributed in fight.
warrior_army_of_one.mechanicalEffects: One Fight. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

warrior_hurl_to_the_moon.name: Hurl to the Moon
warrior_hurl_to_the_moon.description: One fight. Throw objects up to your size for massive damage.
warrior_hurl_to_the_moon.mechanicalEffects: One Fight. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

warrior_perfect_defense.name: Perfect Defense
warrior_perfect_defense.description: One fight. Big Defense bonus; defend vs firearms and in all situations.
warrior_perfect_defense.mechanicalEffects: One Fight. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

warrior_they_re_everywhere.name: They're Everywhere
warrior_they_re_everywhere.description: One fight. Attack everyone in the fight in sight without range/cover penalties.
warrior_they_re_everywhere.mechanicalEffects: One Fight. Immortal Knack (two Calling slots to keep active)—see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

mythos_rust_and_decay.name: Rust and Decay
mythos_rust_and_decay.description: With a touch, corrode and destroy an item; Creator roll vs Size (and armor Scale if any).
mythos_rust_and_decay.mechanicalEffects: Heroic inverted Knack (MotM). Size 0 items destroyed without a roll.

mythos_raze_the_city.name: Raze the City
mythos_raze_the_city.description: Destroy a small building or monument in minutes; spend Momentum to collapse it instantly.
mythos_raze_the_city.mechanicalEffects: Immortal inverted Knack (MotM)—two Calling slots at Hero+ per standard rules.

mythos_honied_words.name: Honied Words
mythos_honied_words.description: Name a charge; Momentum directs them with +2 Enhancement while you watch (waive cost with a Bond).

mythos_puppet_show.name: Puppet Show
mythos_puppet_show.description: Command your charge’s body and mind for one action; requires Bond, lower Tier, consent per MotM sidebar.
mythos_puppet_show.mechanicalEffects: Immortal inverted Knack (MotM). Guardian Knack Skill roll.

mythos_spread_disease.name: Spread Disease
mythos_spread_disease.description: Worsen a patient’s disease Complication or spread it to nearby targets per Healer Knack Skill.

mythos_plague_bearer.name: Plague Bearer
mythos_plague_bearer.description: Spend Momentum to inflict a mythic plague on an area; extra Momentum excludes chosen people.
mythos_plague_bearer.mechanicalEffects: Immortal inverted Knack (MotM). Complication equals Healer Knack Skill.

mythos_scent_of_blood.name: Scent of Blood
mythos_scent_of_blood.description: +1 Enhancement attacking targets who already have Injury Conditions.

mythos_baying_of_the_hounds.name: Baying of the Hounds
mythos_baying_of_the_hounds.description: Momentum unleashes Mythos hunters on your prey—Complication on all actions until unconscious or you catch them.

mythos_curse_of_fragility.name: Curse of Fragility
mythos_curse_of_fragility.description: Momentum in a fight: all enemies attacking your target treat their attacks as having the Brutal tag.

mythos_pronounce_guilt.name: Pronounce Guilt
mythos_pronounce_guilt.description: Declare guilt; evidence rearranges to fit. Clash of Wills if another guilty party appears.

mythos_harsh_words.name: Harsh Words
mythos_harsh_words.description: Order a target; Momentum inflicts Complication on anything but obedience; failing to buy off causes damage.
mythos_harsh_words.mechanicalEffects: Heroic inverted Knack (MotM). Complication tied to Leader Calling rating.

mythos_raise_an_army.name: Raise an Army
mythos_raise_an_army.description: Momentum raises trivial allies—or Mythos creatures where no people exist—to fight for you.

mythos_the_gate_and_key.name: The Gate and Key
mythos_the_gate_and_key.description: Momentum opens a portal between literal doors/windows/manholes to anywhere you have visited, including Terra Incognitae.

mythos_among_the_stars.name: Among the Stars
mythos_among_the_stars.description: Become intangible star-stuff for successes in turns; matter bends around you and attacks slow.
mythos_among_the_stars.mechanicalEffects: Immortal inverted Knack (MotM). Knack Skill roll + Momentum.

mythos_sense_weakness.name: Sense Weakness
mythos_sense_weakness.description: After exchanging attacks with a foe, +1 Enhancement vs. them and +1 Defense for the fight (one foe per scene).

mythos_name_nemesis.name: Name Nemesis
mythos_name_nemesis.description: Declare a named enemy; they become Fatebound as Nemesis (replaces weaker Fatebinding at same rating).

mythos_psychic_attack.name: Psychic Attack
mythos_psychic_attack.description: Momentum + Knack Skill: victim takes increased Difficulty on mental tasks for the scene.

mythos_infinite_knowledge.name: Infinite Knowledge
mythos_infinite_knowledge.description: Ask one question—knowable answers are automatic; unknowable or hidden facts may require roll or Clash; investigations gain one Clue.

mythos_redirect.name: Redirect
mythos_redirect.description: Momentum redirects an enemy’s rage to a new target they attack instead.

mythos_exposed.name: Exposed
mythos_exposed.description: Momentum: tell a damaging lie believed by all who hear; exoneration provokes Clash of Wills.

mythos_twist_the_knife.name: Twist the Knife
mythos_twist_the_knife.description: Painful Blow stunt vs. injured enemies; +1 Difficulty to Antagonists’ actions.
mythos_twist_the_knife.mechanicalEffects: Heroic inverted Knack (MotM). See MotM for stunt cost.

mythos_pain_for_pleasure.name: Pain for Pleasure
mythos_pain_for_pleasure.description: Inflict Injury on a helpless captive to grant your Band +2 Enhancement (+3 if Taken Out).

bornToBeKings.name: Born to be Kings
bornToBeKings.description: Enforcing your will on the World in your parent’s service comes naturally.
bornToBeKings.mechanicalEffects: The first time each scene you would add points to the Momentum pool, add 2 instead. General / Heroic Knack (Pandora’s Box); also listed for pre-Visitation Scions under “any Calling” in Origin chargen.
bornToBeKings.source: Scion_Origin_(Revised_Download).pdf, Knacks (any Calling); SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf, General Heroic Knacks

desperateEntreaty.name: Desperate Entreaty
desperateEntreaty.description: When hurt, you can cry out to the Gods for a scrap of protection.
desperateEntreaty.mechanicalEffects: Once per session, after you take an Injury of any severity, you may plead for aid and gain 2 boxes of hard armor for the rest of the session (does not undo that hit; no stacking if you already have hard/soft armor). General / Heroic Knack (Pandora’s Box).

exemplarOfTheCalling.name: Exemplar of the Calling
exemplarOfTheCalling.description: For a time, your Legend burns aligned with a single Calling, drowning out the rest.
exemplarOfTheCalling.mechanicalEffects: When active: treat one Calling as 5 and ignore other Callings for its duration; you may know extra Knacks from that Calling only (book caps total Knacks while active). Session-long; Adoption Deed and Title rules per Pandora’s Box. Not available before Visitation.

iAmHere.name: I Am Here
iAmHere.description: You can briefly flaunt your full Legend to dominate a social moment.
iAmHere.mechanicalEffects: Once per scene, +2 Enhancement on one social roll to impress, threaten, intimidate, or overwhelm. Everyone in the scene who can sense the supernatural learns your Titanic nature, Legend rating, and pantheon; trivial characters flee or freeze. General / Heroic Knack (Pandora’s Box).

leaveItAllOutThere.name: Leave It All Out There
leaveItAllOutThere.description: When you perform, you can seize the room’s mood wholesale.
leaveItAllOutThere.mechanicalEffects: +2 Enhancement to Shift Atmosphere while performing; you may spend 1 Momentum to reset Atmosphere to 0 for the whole space before that roll, overriding prior vibes. General / Heroic Knack (Pandora’s Box).

monstersUnited.name: Monsters United
monstersUnited.description: Commune with your pantheon’s Titans for guidance when you need an edge.
monstersUnited.mechanicalEffects: Once per session, roll Knack Skill to consult Titanic wisdom; one base question plus extras per success (what here is Titanic, what a named Titan would want, who fears Titans, how to please your progenitor). +2 Enhancement once this scene when you act on an answer. General / Heroic Knack (Pandora’s Box).

overwhelmingPresence.name: Overwhelming Presence
overwhelmingPresence.description: You are difficult to overlook—environment and crowds bend around your notice.
overwhelmingPresence.mechanicalEffects: When you wish, you can be seen and heard clearly despite ordinary environmental Complications. Others who knowingly snub or ignore you take a Complication tied to your highest Titanic Calling (book text); failing to buy it off can drop them prone. General / Heroic Knack (Pandora’s Box).

scentTheDivine.name: Scent the Divine
scentTheDivine.description: A trace of divinity lets you sense other Scions and divine presence nearby.
scentTheDivine.mechanicalEffects: With a sniff or listen, detect another Scion of a chosen pantheon when the book’s conditions are met (use Knack Skill where rolls apply). General / Heroic Knack (Pandora’s Box).

somebodysWatchingMe.name: Somebody's Watching Me
somebodysWatchingMe.description: Your divine parent may not Visit often, but they can still throw you a lifeline.
somebodysWatchingMe.mechanicalEffects: In a scene where you would be in danger, your parent may send brief reinforcements (typically two Mooks or one Professional on your side until scene end). General / Heroic Knack (Pandora’s Box).
